attributes.label: City
attributes.name: City
attributes.description: Most common population center data element within a country (e.g., US city, Canadian municipality)

attributes.label: State or Province

attributes.description: Most common geographic data element within a country (e.g., US state, Canadian province)

attributes.label: Country

attributes.label: PostalCode

attributes.label: AVC

attributes.label: Verification Status

attributes.description: Verification status of the location's postal address, as returned from the address verification/cleansing service

attributes.name: VerificationStatusDetails

attributes.label: ISO 3166-1 Numeric
attributes.name: ISO3166-N
attributes.description: ISO-compliant, numeric country code of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Super Admin Area
attributes.name: SuperAdministrativeArea
attributes.description: The largest geographic data element within a country

attributes.label: Street
attributes.name: Street
attributes.description: Name of the most common thoroughfare, street, or block data element of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Administrative Area
attributes.name: AdministrativeArea
attributes.description: Most common geographic data element within a country (e.g., US state, Canadian province)

attributes.label: Sub-administrative Area
attributes.name: SubAdministrativeArea
attributes.description: Smallest geographic data element within a country (e.g., US county)

attributes.label: Unit
attributes.name: Unit
attributes.description: Details of the unit at the delivery point of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Unit Name
attributes.name: UnitName
attributes.description: Name that describes the type of unit at the delivery point of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Unit Value
attributes.name: UnitValue
attributes.description: Alphanumeric value assigned to the unit at the delivery point of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Floor
attributes.name: Floor
attributes.description: Alphanumeric value assigned to the floor at the delivery point of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Building
attributes.name: Building
attributes.description: Descriptive name identifying an individual location or building at the location's postal address

attributes.label: Sub Building
attributes.name: SubBuilding
attributes.description: Descriptive name identifying an individual sub-location or sub-building at the location's postal address

attributes.label: PO Box
attributes.name: POBox
attributes.description: Uniquely addressable post office (PO) box identifier for the location's postal address

attributes.label: Neighborhood
attributes.name: Neighborhood
attributes.description: Unofficial identifier/description for the sub-area in which the location's postal address is situated

attributes.label: Double Dependent Locality
attributes.name: DoubleDependentLocality
attributes.description: Smallest population center data element, dependent on both the contents of the Locality and DependentLocality fields (e.g., UK Village)

attributes.label: Dependent Thoroughfare
attributes.name: DependentThoroughfare
attributes.description: Dependent street or block data element within a country (e.g., UK Dependent Street)

attributes.label: Locality
attributes.name: Locality
attributes.description: Most common population center data element within a country (e.g., US city, Canadian municipality)

attributes.label: Organization
attributes.name: Organization
attributes.description: Business name associated with a particular delivery point

attributes.label: Premise
attributes.name: Premise
attributes.description: Type and number of the premise for the location's postal address

attributes.label: County
attributes.name: County
attributes.description: Name of the county as applicable for countries where county represents the smallest geographic data element

attributes.label: Unmatched
attributes.name: Unmatched
attributes.description: Contains all input data that cannot be parsed, or is confidently determined to be not part of an address

attributes.label: GeoLocation
attributes.name: GeoLocation
attributes.description: Position of the real-world, geographic location of an object

attributes.label: Latitude
attributes.name: Latitude
attributes.description: Latitudinal coordinates of the real-world, geographic location of the location

attributes.label: Longitude
attributes.name: Longitude
attributes.description: Longitudinal coordinates of the real-world, geographic location of the location

attributes.label: GeoAccuracy
attributes.name: GeoAccuracy
attributes.description: Codified value that describes the overall level of accuracy with which the latitude and longitude coordinate values for the location have been assigned

attributes.label: Automated Zone Indicator
attributes.name: AutoZoneIndicator
attributes.description: Automated Zone Indicator specifies if carrier route sort rates apply to the location's postal address

attributes.label: Carrier Route
attributes.name: CarrierRoute
attributes.description: Carrier route code assigned to a mail delivery or collection route within a 5-digit ZIP Code

attributes.label: CMRA Indicator
attributes.name: CMRAIndicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether or not the location's address is associated with a Commercial Mail Receiving Agency (CMRA), more commonly referred to as a maildrop

attributes.label: Congressional District
attributes.name: CongressionalDistrict
attributes.description: Congressional district (i.e., an electoral division in American politics) to which the address belongs

attributes.label: Default Flag
attributes.name: DefaultFlag
attributes.description: Indicates whether or not the address matched to a highrise default, rural route default, or street default record when compared to the USPS' ZIP+4 file

attributes.label: Delivery Point Bar Code
attributes.name: DeliveryPointBarCode
attributes.description: Delivery Point Barcode (DPBC) is a 3-digit code comprised of a 2-digit delivery point code and an appended check digit; when added to the end of a 5-digit ZIP Code and its corresponding, 4-digit ZIP+4, the DPBC completes the formation of an address' 12-digit POSTNET barcode

attributes.label: DPV Confirmed Indicator
attributes.name: DPVConfirmedIndicator
attributes.description: Indicates the state of deliverability at  the delivery point of the location's postal address

attributes.label: DPV Footnotes
attributes.name: DPVFootnotes
attributes.description: Contains crucial details that are intended for use in conjuction with the DPVConfirmedIndicator field, in order to understand the input address’ validity and deliverability

attributes.label: eLOT Code
attributes.name: eLOTCode
attributes.description: Used with Enhanced Line of Travel (eLOT), a service that enables mailers to earn lower rates by sorting based on delivery sequence, the eLOT code indicates the first occurrence of delivery made to the add-on range within the carrier route

attributes.label: eLOT Number
attributes.name: eLOTNumber
attributes.description: Used with Enhanced Line of Travel (eLOT), a service that enables mailers to earn lower rates by sorting based on delivery sequence, the eLOT Number Indicates the approximate delivery order within the sequence number

attributes.label: EWS Flag
attributes.name: EWSFlag
attributes.description: Indicates whether an address matched a record in the EWS (Early Warning System) file for newer addresses (resulting in a ZIP+4 no match)

attributes.label: False Positive Indicator
attributes.name: FalsePositiveIndicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether a mailing list is being generated or created during validation, as creating a mailing list through DPV certification is disallowed by the USPS

attributes.label: FIPS County Code
attributes.name: FIPSCountyCode
attributes.description: 3-digit FIPS (Federal Information Processing Standard) code which uniquely identifies counties

attributes.label: LACS Link Code
attributes.name: LACSLinkCode
attributes.description: Code returned by LACSLink®  after querying the LACSLink® database

attributes.label: LACS Link Indicator
attributes.name: LACSLinkIndicator
attributes.description: Indicator returned by LACSLink®  after querying the LACSLink® database

attributes.label: LACS Status
attributes.name: LACSStatus
attributes.description: Indicates (with a value of 'L') that the input address matched an entry in the Locatable Address Conversion Service database, thereby confirming that the input address was converted from a rural-style address to a city-style address

attributes.label: No Stat Indicator
attributes.name: NoStatIndicator
attributes.description: Indicates the address is not receiving delivery, and the address is not counted as a possible delivery

attributes.label: PMB Number
attributes.name: PMBNumber
attributes.description: Private Mail Box (or PMB) number to be appended to the PrimaryAddressLine field, if applicable (and which follows the PMB Type)

attributes.label: PMB Type
attributes.name: PMBType
attributes.description: Private Mail Box (or PMB) type to be appended to the PrimaryAddressLine field, if applicable (and which comes before the PMB Number)

attributes.label: Primary Address Line
attributes.name: PrimaryAddressLine
attributes.description: Primary delivery address line used in CASS certified address validation

attributes.label: Record Type
attributes.name: RecordType
attributes.description: Record type of an address that has been confirmed as a valid delivery address

attributes.label: Return Code
attributes.name: ReturnCode
attributes.description: Codified value that provides addtional information about the data returned for the delivery point of the location's postal address

attributes.label: Secondary Address Line
attributes.name: SecondaryAddressLine
attributes.description: Secondary delivery address line, if present, used in CASS certified address validation

attributes.label: SUITE Link Footnote
attributes.name: SUITELinkFootnote
attributes.description: Code returned after querying the SuiteLink® database that indicates whether or not the input address matched to a record in the SuiteLink® database

attributes.label: Vacant Indicator
attributes.name: VacantIndicator
attributes.description: Indicator that the delivery point of the location's postal address was active in the past, but is currently vacant, has most likely been unoccupied for over 90 days, and is not receiving deliveries

attributes.label: Census Indicator
attributes.name: CensusIndicator
attributes.description: Returns the address level for which census data was returned (typically at the 'premise' level)

attributes.label: Census Code
attributes.name: CensusCode
attributes.description: Codes published and used to represent Administrative Areas (Admin Level 1-4 in the U.S.) and all Zones with official government codes

attributes.label: Census Class Code
attributes.name: CensusClassCode
attributes.description: Alphanumeric code that defines the census classification of a place, as given by the FIPS 55-3 standard

attributes.label: GNIS Feature ID
attributes.name: GNISFeatureID
attributes.description: Geographic Names Information System (GNIS) Feature ID is a code that is used to represent all known places, features, and areas in the United States that are identified by a proper name

attributes.label: Block Code
attributes.name: BlockCode
attributes.description: A Block Code represents the smallest geographic unit used by the US Census Bureau

attributes.label: Block Group Code
attributes.name: BlockGroupCode
attributes.description: A Block Group Code represents a collection of census blocks

attributes.label: CBSA Code
attributes.name: CBSACode
attributes.description: A 5-digit code representing a Core-Based Statistical Area (CBSA)

attributes.label: CBSA Name
attributes.name: CBSAName
attributes.description: Name given to a Core-Based Statistical Area (CBSA) and complementary to a CBSA Code

attributes.label: Metro Division Code
attributes.name: MetroDivisionCode
attributes.description: Code given to a county or group of contiguous counties that serve as a distinct employment region in a metropolitan statistical area and that have a population core of 2.5 million or more

attributes.label: Metro Division Name
attributes.name: MetroDivisionName
attributes.description: Name given to a county or group of contiguous counties that serve as a distinct employment region in a metropolitan statistical area and that have a population core of 2.5 million or more

attributes.label: NECTA Code
attributes.name: NECTACode
attributes.description: A 5-digit New England City and Town Areas (NECTAs) code that refers to a geographic area defined using cities and towns in the six New England states

attributes.label: NECTA Name
attributes.name: NECTAName
attributes.description: Name given to a New England City and Town Areas (NECTAs) geographic area, as defined using cities and towns in the six New England states; complements a NECTA Code

attributes.label: NECTA Division Code
attributes.name: NECTADivisionCode
attributes.description: Code for a subdivided, smaller geographic area that, along with other nearby divisions, combines to form a highly populous New England City and Town Area (NECTA)

attributes.label: NECTA Division Name
attributes.name: NECTADivisionName
attributes.description: Name given to a subdivided, smaller geographic area that, along with other nearby divisions, combines to form a highly populous New England City and Town Area (NECTA);  complements a NECTA Division Code

attributes.label: Census Code (2010 Census Format)
attributes.name: OldCensusCode
attributes.description: Refers to a previous format of Census Code wherein the FIPS code value of an admin place is prefixed with the corresponding StateCode and separated by a dash

attributes.label: MSA Code (2010 Census Format)
attributes.name: OldMSACode
attributes.description: A 4-digit value that represents an obsolete code for an MSA (metropolitan areas), as defined by the OMB in 1990, but which has since been replaced with CBSA codes

attributes.label: MSA Name (2010 Census Format)
attributes.name: OldMSAName
attributes.description: An obsolete name for an MSA (metropolitan areas), as defined by the OMB in 1990, but which has since been replaced with CBSA names

attributes.label: Tract Code
attributes.name: TractCode
attributes.description: A 6-digit code that represents census data as defined by geographic entities within counties

attributes.label: Results String
attributes.name: ResultsString
attributes.description: Codified value that provides information about the verification process and address of the returned result

attributes.label: Other Parsed Data
attributes.name: ParsedGarbage
attributes.description: Captures unallocated information that the CASS engine is able to parse out during the matching process

attributes.label: Time Zone UTC
attributes.name: TimeZone_UTC
attributes.description: UTC defines the Coordinated Universal Time; provided by the Time Zone Enhancement Dataset

attributes.label: Time Zone DST
attributes.name: TimeZone_DST
attributes.description: DST defines the Daylight Saving Time; provided by the Time Zone Enhancement Dataset

attributes.label: Time Zone Name
attributes.name: TimeZone_Name
attributes.description: Time Zone Name; provided by the Time Zone Enhancement Dataset
